_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management

ppd_preauth.q: Was Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management submitted?
Was the Retrograde urethrography/ Voiding cystourethrogram report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers submitted?
Was the Detailed Procedure/Operative notes submitted?
Was the Detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: No evidence of meatal stenosis or narrowing of meatus in retrograde urethrography.
Clinical notes, including evaluation findings and indication for procedure, not submitted at pre-authorization.
Retrograde urethrography/Voiding cystourethrogram report not submitted at pre-authorization.
Detailed Procedure/Operative notes not submitted at claim submission.
Detailed discharge summary not submitted at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: A small drop of blood at the tip of the penis when finished urinating
